overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along Night City's waterfront promenade. The camera follows characters past palm trees, neon billboards, and towering glass skyscrapers before crossing a busy intersection. The scene features bright midday lighting with vivid cyberpunk aesthetics including elevated highways and digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with orange safety railing

events.description: camera pans upward to look at tall glass skyscrapers and elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, occasionally looking up at the towering architecture and palm trees

notable_agents.action: couple standing by the orange railing looking out at the view

entered.detail: bright orange safety railing along the promenade edge
tall futuristic skyscraper with curved reflective glass facade and geometric patterns
massive elevated highway overpass with structural supports and neon lighting
large digital billboard displaying a geisha advertisement on building facade
tall palm trees lining the promenade walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade with an orange safety railing. The camera walks forward past palm trees while panning up to admire towering glass skyscrapers and an elevated highway overpass. A couple stands by the railing on the left, and large digital billboards are visible on the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal overlook with industrial district view

events.description: camera turns to overlook the canal and industrial buildings across the water
camera pans back up from water view to continue along the promenade

agents.ego_description: stopping to look over the railing at the canal and industrial area below

entered.detail: murky green canal water with concrete embankments and industrial structures across
large industrial building with smokestacks across the canal
red and white branded billboard at water level with 'NICOLA' text
small digital poster display showing a person's face

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to face the canal, showing murky water and industrial buildings on the opposite bank. The elevated highway creates partial shade overhead. The orange railing is now in the right foreground as the view focuses on the water and industrial district before panning back to continue the walk.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy riverside walkway with traffic and neon advertisements

events.description: orange van drives past on the left side of the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade passing other pedestrians and observing the street traffic

notable_agents.action: man in blue suit leaning over railing looking at the water below
orange delivery van driving along the street parallel to the promenade

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building covered in multiple circular digital advertisement displays
suspended street sign reading 'Paradey' over the roadway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the promenade with the orange railing on the right, the scene features moderate pedestrian traffic and vehicles passing on the left. A distinctive cylindrical building covered in digital ads dominates the left side, while palm trees line the walkway. A man in a blue suit leans over the railing to look at the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: orange railing transitions to concrete barrier as the promenade approaches the intersection
ego crosses the street at the crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete barrier section then stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the busy intersection

notable_agents.action: black van waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: grey concrete safety barrier replacing the orange railing along the walkway edge
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing with 'WAIT' painted on the asphalt
traffic signal pole with lights showing green for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the transition from orange railing to concrete barrier as the walkway approaches an intersection. The camera continues to the crosswalk, marked with 'WAIT' on the asphalt, and crosses the street while a black van waits nearby. The elevated highway remains visible in the background as the scene ends in the middle of the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny waterfront promenade that gradually transitions into a busy urban intersection. It begins by walking past palm trees and an orange safety railing, panning upward to take in towering glass skyscrapers and a massive elevated highway overpass. As the camera turns toward the canal, the view shifts to the murky water and industrial buildings on the opposite bank before panning back to continue the stroll past a cylindrical building covered in digital advertisements. The scene then progresses through a flow of pedestrians and vehicles, passing a man in a blue suit leaning over the railing. Finally, the orange railing gives way to a concrete barrier as the camera moves toward a crosswalk marked with WAIT, crossing the street past a waiting black van with the highway still looming in the background.
